Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Oct-26-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOAN, LLC's Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is Granted, no opposition filed. Moving party to prepare form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ehg
